---
title: "Old England,  a Pictorial Museum of Regal, Ecclesistical, Baronial, Municipal, and Popular Antiquities"
---

## Old England,  a Pictorial Museum of Regal, Ecclesistical, Baronial, Municipal, and Popular Antiquities

**Author:** Charles Knight
**Date:** 1845
**Imprint:** London: Knight

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
